name: Echoes of Karma
short_description: A Flirty Demon and Gay Magician's campy, silly, cartoony adventure turns into an Existential Drama, as they fail to defy what they truly are and the past of their family... Block adrenaline rushing enemy attacks in Turn Based RPG combat.
detailed_description:
Echoes of Karma is a game about a flirty demon and gay magician who travel the multiverse. As they travel, they discover a threatening construct known as Glitches. The game is a turn based RPG, but with Blocking Mechanics during the enemy turn. Save TP by skipping your turn to use higher level abilities!

Features Include|

-Episode Based Storytelling inspired by cartoons

-Built in No-Hit mode (put on the tied HP mode and 1HP mode for the ultimate challenge!)

-6 episodes with 6 more in development

-Simple but dynamic turn based mechanics

-1 "Ultra Boss", bosses that challenge your gameplay abilities to the fullest (3 total in the whole game)

-Customizable Boss Rush

-And More!  Some features are still in development.

Important Note: Game is best played with a controller and should support the majority of controllers.

F4 to toggle full screen.

Send all bug reports to eokbugs@gmail.com
